a:r.a:t: Top-Down Composition | The $17.0B budget-anchored MRO decomposes into Public NSY ($7.49B, 44%), OMN 1B4B private avail

Note: Indentation in column 1 marks rollup hierarchy. Sum the level-0 rows (no indent) to reach the $16,996M grand total; the indented private-avail leaves and subtotals are children of OMN 1B4B Total and must not be added again. CMAV ($663M FY2025) called out per industry-side request. MSC FY2025 M and R executes within 1B1B but transfers to 1B4B in FY2026 ($1.58B). Source: PB26 OMN OP-5 (p.157, MSC p.129); PB26 SCN P-40 LI 2086 (p.175); PB26 OPN BA-1 P-40 LI 1000 (p.521); PB26 USCG Justification (p.6). Data as of April 2026.
FY2025 MRO Top-Down TAM by Budget Source ($M)
